analysis.consistency: High. The feature aligns perfectly with standard D&D 5e class progression where Extra Attack is granted at level 5 for martial classes.
analysis.quality: High. The description is clear, concise, and accurately reflects the mechanical effect of the feature.

mechanics.trigger: Taking the Attack action on your turn
mechanics.effect: Increases the number of attacks made from one to two.
mechanics.clarity: Excellent. The wording 'you can attack twice, instead of once' is unambiguous.

analysis.notes: This is a canonical, essential feature for the Paladin class, correctly placed at level 5.
